app.scripture: Their hearts [were] knit together in unity and in love.

suggest_fab.title: Suggest an enhancement
suggest_fab.placeholder: Describe the idea or the friction…

landing.blurb: A fellowship-matching app that helps ward members form lasting friendships with the people the missionaries are teaching.
landing.members_hint: Members: tap "Get my survey link" if you're not sure what to do with this page.

signup.check_email_body: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Tap it from the same browser you opened this page in.
signup.after_confirm: After you confirm, ask your stake's missionary high councilor to add you as a Ward Mission Leader (or Stake President to add another stake leader). You'll see Knit data once they've granted you a role.
signup.intro: Knit accepts both email magic-link and email + password sign-in. Pick a password here if you'd rather not wait for an email link each time.
signup.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.members_no_signup: Members — don't sign up here. The Ward Mission Leader will text you a personal link to your

login.check_email_body: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Tap it from the same browser you opened this page in.
login.members_no_signin: Members — don't sign in here. Use the link we texted you.

forgot_password.check_email_body: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Tap it from the same browser.
forgot_password.intro: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

reset_password.needs_email_link: This page only works from a password reset email link. Please use the link sent to your inbox.
reset_password.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

magic_link.missing_token: This link is missing its member id or token.
magic_link.could_not_verify: We couldn't verify this link. It may have expired or been replaced.
magic_link.ask_for_fresh: Ask your ward mission leader to send you a fresh link.

join.title: Get your Knit link
join.subtitle: Tell us who you are and we'll text your personal survey link.
join.phone_hint: The number you usually get texts on. We'll text your link there.
join.default_success: If we found you in your ward roster, we just texted your Knit link to that number. Tap it to open your survey.
join.trouble: Trouble? Ask your ward mission leader to add you, or reach out to your bishop.

layout.not_provisioned_body: You're signed in as {{email}}, but you don't have a Knit admin profile yet. Ask the person who invited you to finish setting up your account, or — if you're the first admin for your stake — reach out to support.

dashboard.read_only_note: You have read-only access to Knit. Names, availability, and outings are visible, but only ward leaders can make changes.
dashboard.card_members_ward: Invite members, see who's active, review availability.
dashboard.card_members_stake: See member engagement across the stake.
dashboard.card_friends_body: Roster of people the missionaries are fellowshipping.
dashboard.card_suggest_body: Who should go with which friend? Ranked matches with reasons.
dashboard.card_sheet_body: Provision and refresh the Google Sheet for the missionaries.
dashboard.card_users_body: Add, edit, or remove Knit admins across the stake.

members.page_subtitle: Ward members enrolled in fellowship matching.
members.show_all_label: Show everyone in the roster (not just registered)
members.empty_top: No members yet. Add your first above.
members.phone_hint: Used later for SMS nudges via Tidings
members.remove_confirm: Remove this member? This is permanent for now.
members.regenerate_confirm: This member already has a link. Generating a new one will invalidate the old one. Continue?
members.summary_show_all_partial: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} members in the roster{{wardLabel}}. Type a name or phone to search the rest.
members.search_across_stake: Want to search across the whole stake?

invite_modal.title: Invite {{name}}
invite_modal.intro: Knit will send {{first}} a personal link to the availability survey. The link is unique to them and valid for 30 days.
invite_modal.or_copy: Or copy the link to send another way

friends.page_subtitle: People the missionaries are currently teaching.
friends.empty: No friends yet. Add your first above.
friends.tap_when_free: Tap any slots when the friend is usually free
friends.interests_hint: What the friend likes — used to find members with shared interests
friends.appear_within_hour: Changes appear on the missionary sheet within the hour.
friends.remove_confirm: Remove this friend? Past outings stay; the friend will be hidden from the roster and the missionary sheet.

outings.page_subtitle: Who went with whom, when, and what came of it.
outings.empty: No outings logged yet. Log your first above.
outings.member_hint: Leave blank if missionaries went without a ward member
outings.outcome_hint: What happened? What should someone follow up on?
outings.notes_placeholder: Friend loved meeting the Johnsons — wants to come to dinner next week.
outings.pick_ward_friend: Pick a ward and a friend.

suggest.page_subtitle: Pick a friend and a time; we'll rank the best 5 ward members for the outing.
suggest.no_active_friends: No active friends in this ward
suggest.need_hint: Filter to members willing to do this specifically
suggest.recent_subtitle: What missionaries asked for on the sheet's Suggestions tab, with the top members Knit returned.
suggest.recent_empty: No requests yet. When a missionary fills the Suggestions tab on the sheet, they'll appear here.

invitations.no_permission: You don't have permission to send Knit invitations. Ask your stake president, stake clerk, the high councilor over missionary work, or a ward mission leader.
invitations.subtitle: Send a member the Knit availability survey by text. Search by name or phone, pick the member, and Knit texts the personalized link — no copy-paste needed.
invitations.search_placeholder: Start typing a name or phone
invitations.empty: No invitations yet. Send the first above.

settings.page_subtitle: Stake configuration, ward roster, and per-ward Google Sheet bindings.
settings.stake_subtitle: Top-level org unit. Wards live underneath it.
settings.wards_summary_one: {{count}} ward configured. Each ward has its own members, friends, and Google Sheet.
settings.wards_summary_other: {{count}} wards configured. Each ward has its own members, friends, and Google Sheet.
settings.ward_added: Ward added. {{name}}'s WML can wire up the Google Sheet from /admin/sheet.
settings.ward_cannot_remove: Cannot remove {{name}} — it has {{members}} member(s) and {{friends}} friend(s). Move or remove those first.
settings.name: Name
settings.need_change_admins: Need to add or change other admins?

sheet.page_subtitle: Auto-create a Google Sheet for each ward and share it with the missionaries. Knit keeps the data tabs in sync.
sheet.view_only_note: Your role has view-only access. Sheet creation and sync are managed by ward leadership (Ward Mission Leader, Relief Society Presidency, or Elders Quorum Presidency).
sheet.new_sheets_drive: . New sheets will be created in this Google account's Drive.
sheet.not_connected: Not connected. Connect a Google account so Knit can create sheets for you.
sheet.disconnect_confirm: Disconnect the Google account? New sheets can't be created until you reconnect.
sheet.sync_explain: Sync now is two-way: it pulls anything missionaries wrote on the sheet (new friends, outings, suggestion requests, feedback) and then pushes the latest member roster, friends list, and recent outings back. Also runs hourly in the background.
sheet.access_intro: Anyone here can open the sheet in Google. Add missionaries when a new companionship arrives; remove them when they transfer.
sheet.nobody_added: Nobody added yet — just you (the connected Google account) can open the sheet.
sheet.add_emails_label: Add missionary or admin Gmail addresses
sheet.share_with_admins: Share with all current Knit admins
sheet.share_admins_explain: Adds every stake-leadership and ward-leadership admin (super admins, stake presidency, high councilors, and this ward's WML / RSP / EQP) who isn't already on the sheet.
sheet.create_intro_can: We'll create a new Google Sheet in your connected Drive, share it with the missionaries, and lay out the 7 tabs.
sheet.create_intro_cannot: Connect a Google account first (above), then come back to create the sheet.
sheet.emails_hint: Separate with commas, spaces, or newlines. Leave blank for now and share from the sheet directly later if you prefer.
sheet.all_admins_have_access: All current Knit admins already have access.
sheet.oauth_err_state: Connect attempt expired or was interfered with. Try again.
sheet.oauth_err_no_refresh: Google did not return a refresh token. Try again; if it keeps failing, remove the app at https://myaccount.google.com/permissions and reconnect.
sheet.oauth_err_no_email: Could not determine your Google email. Try again.
sheet.oauth_err_no_admin: You connected as {{email}}, but that email doesn't match any Knit admin. Sign in to Knit with that same email first (or use a Google account whose email matches your Knit admin email).
sheet.status_load_failed: Could not load Google connection status. Refresh to try again.
sheet.add_at_least_one_email: Add at least one email address.

users.no_permission: Only stake presidency or super admins can manage users and roles.
users.page_subtitle: One list of everyone who can sign in to Knit or has a stake/ward role in the Gathered apps. Edit Knit admin access and suite roles in one place.
users.tidings_subtitle: Pulls every active contact from Tidings into knit_members. Safe to run anytime. Auto-runs nightly via pg_cron.
users.sync_result: Pulled {{contacts}} contacts: {{inserted}} new, {{updated}} updated, {{skipped}} skipped, {{missing}} unmapped ward.
users.empty: No users match. Invite the first above.
users.remove_confirm: Remove {{email}}? They will lose Knit admin access (suite roles stay).
users.pick_ward_role: Pick a ward for this Knit role.
users.pick_at_least_one: Pick at least one Knit role or one suite role.
users.grant_super_long: Grant super admin (bypasses ward / stake scoping)
users.suite_roles_explain: Roles shared across all Gathered apps. One person can hold multiple.
users.suite_roles_short: Shared across all Gathered apps. One person can hold multiple.
users.invite_footer: If they already have a Knit login, we'll add the role to their account. Otherwise, they get a magic-link email to finish signing in.

release_notes.title: Release notes
release_notes.subtitle: What changed and when, newest first. Updated on every push.

guide.title: User guide
guide.subtitle: How Knit works, what each role can do, and where to start.
guide.what_is_body: Knit pairs ward members with the people the missionaries are teaching, so investigators and recent converts gain real friendships in the ward — not just appointments. It tracks members, their availability and interests, the friends being taught, and the outings that bring them together.
guide.what_is_name: The name comes from Mosiah 18:21 — "their hearts [were] knit together in unity and in love."
guide.role_stake_hc_body: — view-only across every ward in the stake.
guide.role_wml_body: — edit access for their ward. Adds members and friends, logs outings, and manages the ward's Google Sheet binding.
guide.role_aux_body: — edit access for their ward, scoped to their auxiliary's members.
guide.role_super_body: — bypasses scope checks; manages users across the suite.
guide.start_members_body: — add the ward members who are available to befriend investigators. Capture availability and interests so Suggest can do its job.
guide.start_invitations_body: — send a member their availability survey from inside Knit. Search by name or phone, pick the member, and Knit texts the personalized link. The same page shows recent sends and whether they actually went through.
guide.start_friends_body: — add the people the missionaries are teaching. Track which lessons they've had and what they enjoy.
guide.start_suggest_body: — see proposed pairings based on overlap.
guide.start_outings_body: — log when ward members and friends spend time together. Outings build the data Suggest learns from.
guide.who_send_body: Ward mission leaders see and send for their own ward. Stake presidency, stake clerks, and the high councilor over missionary work see and send across the whole stake — including invitations generated by the missionary sheet's Members to Invite tab.
guide.settings_body: Stake / ward roster, sheet bindings, and your own account live under Settings. Demo mode (a safe way to walk a leader through Knit without touching real data) is enabled from Settings too — it is not a top-level tab.
guide.sheet_access_auto_body: When someone is granted Knit access (via the Gathered page or an in-Knit invite), they get Drive editor access on every ward sheet they can view — first time they sign in. The morning sync also reconciles every binding as a backstop.
guide.sheet_access_miss_body: still need to be added by hand because their Gmails change with every transfer. Open the Sheet tab, pick the ward, and use the "Who has access" panel:
guide.sheet_access_add_body: — paste the new missionary Gmails and click
guide.sheet_access_share_body: . They get a Google notification with the link.
guide.sheet_access_remove_body: — click the × on a chip when a missionary transfers out.
guide.sheet_access_share_all: Share with all current Knit admins
guide.sheet_access_share_all_body: — manual equivalent of the auto-reconcile. Safe to click anytime; it just adds anyone who's missing.
guide.suggest_enh_body_mid: in the bottom-right corner of every admin screen. Tap it, type what you'd change or what felt clunky, and hit
guide.suggest_enh_body_post: . Your name, email, and the page you were on are attached automatically — suggestions go straight to Scott and into a shared tracker so you can be told later when an idea was implemented.
guide.language_body: The EN / ES toggle in the top bar switches the interface language and remembers your preference. Spanish coverage is still being expanded — some long-form admin copy may stay English-only for now.

demo.banner_blurb: Walk through Knit as different roles. Pair with /admin/demo Load to populate the database.
demo.role_banner_subtitle: Overlay a "viewing as <role>" strip across every Knit screen so you can talk through what each role experiences. Independent of the database-level demo data toggle below.
demo.demo_data_subtitle_pre: Seed a realistic set of members, friends, and outings so you can test the suggestion algorithm, onboarding flow, and sheet integration without hand-entering everything. Demo rows are tagged
demo.demo_data_subtitle_post: and can be wiped at any time.
demo.current_data_title: Current demo data in this ward
demo.pick_ward_status: Pick a ward to see status.
demo.clear_confirm: Delete all demo members, friends, and outings in this ward?
demo.already_loaded_notice: Demo data already present ({{members}} members · {{friends}} friends · {{outings}} outings).
demo.details_members: with varied availability, interests, and participation styles. Two are Spanish speakers, one hasn't been onboarded yet so you can see the "Not onboarded" state.
demo.details_friends: with different teaching statuses (investigating, progressing, on a baptism date) and languages.
demo.details_outings: spread over the last 45 days, plus one scheduled 5 days out. Mix of
demo.details_outings_post: — enough to exercise the freshness and reliability scoring in Suggest.

gather_redirect.title: Redirecting to Gather…
gather_redirect.body: The Gather page now lives in Glean so there's one place to manage user access across every app.

member_dash.not_signed_in_body: Use the personal link your ward mission leader sent you by text to get in.
member_dash.link_expired_body: Your link may have expired. Ask for a fresh one.
member_dash.opted_out_body: Missionaries won't be paired with you and you won't get the weekly check-in. Your availability and preferences are kept in case you want to come back.
member_dash.break_body: Pause and we won't send the weekly check-in for a while.
member_dash.or_optout_intro: Or, if you'd rather not be part of Knit at all —
member_dash.opt_out_confirm:
Opt out of Knit?

Missionaries won't be paired with you anymore and you'll stop getting the weekly check-in. You can rejoin anytime from this same page.

interest_picker.category_culture: Languages or cultures you connect with

onboarding_inline.intro: Our missionaries are teaching people who could use a friend — a real one, who stays after the missionaries transfer.
onboarding_inline.privacy: We keep just those things. No address, no finances, no family details.
onboarding_inline.days_hint: Tap any times that work most weeks.
onboarding_inline.interests_hint: Pick a few — as many as you want.
onboarding_inline.styles_hint: Missionaries need different kinds of help. What are you happy to do?
onboarding_inline.footer_note: We'll text you again in about 90 days to update your availability. You can always change it sooner by tapping your link.

errors.unique_violation: A record with these details already exists.
errors.fk_violation: Can't complete that — a related record is missing or in use.
errors.not_null: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.check_violation: That value doesn't meet the constraints for this field.
errors.permission_denied: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.not_found: Couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalid_credentials: That email and password don't match an account.
errors.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address first — check your inbox for the confirmation link.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.network: Network problem. Check your connection and try again.
